title: Oracle Siebel CRM Account
description: An Account business component record in Oracle Siebel CRM representing a customer, prospect, or partner organization. Accounts are the primary organizational entity in Siebel CRM and serve as the parent for contacts, opportunities, service requests, orders, and other related business components.

Id.description: Unique system-generated row identifier for the account record

Location.description: Location identifier distinguishing multiple sites for the same organization (e.g., Headquarters, HQ-Distribution)

Account Status.description: Current lifecycle status of the account

Account Type.description: Type classification of the account (e.g., Customer, Prospect, Partner, Competitor)

Description.description: Detailed description of the account and business relationship

Primary Organization.description: Name of the primary Siebel organization associated with the account for visibility and access control

Primary Organization Id.description: Row identifier of the primary Siebel organization

Main Phone Number.description: Primary telephone number for the account

Main Fax Number.description: Primary fax number for the account

Email Address.description: Primary email address for the account

Home Page.description: Website URL for the account organization

Current Volume.description: Current business volume or revenue amount

Alias.description: Alternate name or alias for the account

Parent Account Id.description: Row identifier of the parent account for hierarchical account structures

CSN.description: Customer service number assigned to the account

DUNS Number.description: Dun and Bradstreet DUNS number for the organization

Number of Employees.description: Approximate number of employees in the organization

Annual Revenue.description: Estimated annual revenue of the organization

Currency Code.description: ISO 4217 currency code for monetary values

Address.description: Physical address associated with the account
